/CAL: DA MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE COURT NUMBERS 22001270 & 22002435 & RELEASEOF SUBPOENAED RECORDS/DAWT/GRTD: DA MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE COURT NUMBERS 22001270 & 22002435/X: SUBPOENAED RECORDS RECEIVED, DOCUMENTS IN ENVELOPE #1 OF 2 ENVELOPES GIVEN TO THE PEOPLE/CONTD: TO SET PRELIMINARY HEARING INDEPT 20/DAWF/TE: 3 HOURS/

/CAL: PREHEARING CONFERENCE AND DA MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE COURT NO,S 22001270 AND 22002435/SATERM/SAORD/SA1: BRANDY FONG, ASIAN FEMALE, DOB 12-02-86/SAORD3/CTORD: THE PROTECTED PERSONS MAY RECORD ANY PROHIBITED COMMUNICATIONS MADEBY THE RESTRAINED PERSON/OR/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S OFFICE,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS AND SCRAM DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSO/CTORD: DEFENDANT SHALL BE RELEASED AFTER A COORDINATED PICK-UP WITH SFSO COMMUNITY PROGRAMS IS IN PLACE/WEAP/WS/CTORD: DEFENDANT MUST REMAIN CONFINED WITHIN INTERIOR PREMISES OF RESIDENCE (HOME DETENTION) UNLESS AUTHORIZED BY A SFSO SWORN EMPLOYEE/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/CONTD: HEARING ON DA MOTION TOCONSOLIDATE COURT NO,S 22001270 AND 22002435 AND RELEASE OF SUBPOENAED RECORDS/DAWF/

/CAL: RELEASE OF SUBPOENAED RECORDS & DA MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE/X: THE PUBLIC DEFENDER'S OFFICE IS RELIEVED TODAY/X: KERI A, EVILSIZOR APPEARS IN COURT TODAY FOR NEW COUNSEL, ALEXANDER CROSS/STWPX/OR/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S OFFICE,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH GPS AND SCRAM DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSO/CTORD: DEFENDANT SHALL BE RELEASED AFTER A COORDINATED PICK-UP WITH SFSO COMMUNITY PROGRAMS IS IN PLACE,/WS/WEAP/CTORD: DEFENDANT TO REMAIN CONFINED WITHIN INTERIOR PREMISES OF RESIDENCE (HOME DETENTION) UNLESS AUTHORIZED BY A SFSO SWORN EMPLOYEE, APPROVED HOME DETENTION ACTIVITIES - WORK, TREATMENT/CTORD: DEFENDANT NOT TO CONSUME ANY DRUGS OR ALCOHOL/CTORD: DEFENDANT TO ABIDE BY ALL PREVIOUSLY ISSUED STAY AWAY ORDERS (622 CABRILLO ST, SFCA)/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/X: SUBPOENAED RECORDS RECEIVED & ENVELOPE #3 IS RELEASED TO DEFENSE COUNSEL & RECEIVED IN DISCOVERY/CONTD: PREHEARING CONFERENCE & DA MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE COURT NO,S 22001270 AND 22002435/

/CAL: ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR RELEASE OF SUBPOENAED RECORDS/CTORD: ENVELOPES1 AND 3 ARE RELEASED PER STIPULATION TO REQUESTING PARTIES/VD: PRELIMINARY HEARING OF 03-29-22/LDPX: 04-11-22 (60)/OR/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S OFFICE,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS AND SCRAM DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSO//CTORD: DEFENDANT SHALL BE RELEASED AFTER A COORDINATED PICK-UP WITH SFSO COMMUNITY PROGRAMS IS IN PLACE,/WEAP/WS/CTORD: DO NOT CONSUME ANY DRUGS OR ALCOHOL/CTORD: REMAIN CONFINED WITHIN INTERIOR PREMESIS OF RESIDENCE (HOMEDETENTION) UNLESS AUTHORIZED BY A SFSO SWORN EMPLOYEE, APPROVED HOME DETENTION ACTIVITIES- WORK, TREATMENT/CTORD: ABIDE BY ALL PREVIOUSLY ISSUED STAYAWAY ORDERS/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/CONTD: RELEASE OF SUBPOENAED RECORDS AND HEARING ON DA MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE COURT NO,S 22001270 AND 22002435 IN DEPARTMENT 12/DOP/CONTD: TO SET PRELIMINARY HEARING IN DEPARTMENT 20/DOP/TE: 3 HOURS COMBINED WITH 22002435/

/CAL:ARRAIGNMENT/X:DA IS APPEARING VIA ZOOM/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/NTW60/LDPX:04-11-22/ORNAS/WEAP/SA1:BRANDY LYNN FONG/SA2:622 CABRILLO ST, SF 94118/SAORD3/SAORD/CONTD: PRELIMINARY HEARING/DOP/X:EST 1,5 HRS/

/X:TO SET/ CTORD: HEARD IN DEPARTMENT 12 TODAY/
